tool.name: synthesize_attack_hypotheses
tool.description: Synthesize attack hypotheses and attack-chain ideas from runtime inventory, mined surface artifacts, discovered workflows, session profiles, and the current assessment ledger so the agent can hunt beyond checklist coverage.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label to synthesize hypotheses for.

parameter.name: max_hypotheses
parameter.description: Maximum number of synthesized hypotheses to return. Default: 12.

parameter.name: persist
parameter.description: Whether to persist the synthesized hypotheses into the shared hypothesis ledger. Default: true.

parameter.name: include_existing_open
parameter.description: Whether to include hypotheses that already exist as open/in-progress items. Default: false.

tool.name: generate_contextual_payloads
tool.description: Generate context-aware payload variants for a given vulnerability type, including encoded forms and optional callback/OOB URLs, so spraying and validation can go beyond a small static payload list.

parameter.name: vulnerability_type
parameter.description: Target vulnerability class such as idor, sqli, xss, ssrf, xxe, rce, ssti, or path_traversal.

parameter.name: surface
parameter.description: Short description of the target surface or sink these payloads will be used against.

parameter.name: parameter_names
parameter.description: Optional input parameter names or fields that will receive these payloads.

parameter.name: callback_urls
parameter.description: Optional callback/OOB URLs to embed into SSRF or XXE payloads.

parameter.name: include_encodings
parameter.description: Whether to produce raw plus encoded variants. Default: true.

parameter.name: max_variants
parameter.description: Maximum number of payload variants to return. Default: 24.

tool.name: triage_attack_anomalies
tool.description: Score and triage high-signal anomalies across response variants, including authorization parity, timing oracles, redirect oddities, length drift, semantic exploit markers, and blind/OOB interactions, then record coverage/evidence and optionally a new hypothesis.

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: Logical target label for the coverage and hypothesis ledger.

parameter.name: component
parameter.description: Component or subsystem associated with the observations.

parameter.name: observations
parameter.description: Observation objects to compare. Include at least name plus any status_code, body_hash, body_length, body_preview, elapsed_ms, location, error, oob_interaction, or callback_protocol fields available.

parameter.name: baseline_name
parameter.description: Optional baseline observation name. When omitted, the highest-rank role-like name is used.

parameter.name: min_score
parameter.description: Minimum anomaly score required before an observation is considered suspicious. Default: 4.

parameter.name: persist_hypothesis
parameter.description: Whether to persist a hypothesis when suspicious anomalies are found. Default: true.
